title: ICNS Icon
documentation:
## Purpose
Represents an Apple ICNS file, the native macOS icon container format. ICNS files store multiple resolutions and pixel densities of an icon in a single file, from 16x16 to 1024x1024, including Retina variants.

## When to use
Use `media:icns;image` when a node produces or consumes macOS application icons. ICNS files are required when packaging macOS applications and are not used on other platforms. For cross-platform icon formats, see [ICO Icon](https://capdag.com/browse/media:ico;image).

## Notes
An ICNS file is a container of multiple image representations. Tools that generate ICNS files typically require PNG source images at each supported resolution. Direct pixel-level access requires parsing the ICNS container structure.
